creator: roam@orbitel.bg
text:
On Tue, May 29, 2001 at 05:29:02AM -0600, Jeff Palmer wrote:
> I would like to resubmit my patch,  as it includes the manfile that is 
> installed.
> The current port installs the manfile,  but does not include it in the DB 
> fro pkg_delete
> 
> 
> Added to the Makefile should be:
> 
> MAN6=   sex.6
> MANCOMPRESSED=  yes

Eep, sorry, never noticed the followup to the PR :\
These changes went in as part of the checksum update, thanks!

G'luck,
Peter

-- 
No language can express every thought unambiguously, least of all this one.
